allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = sys.stdin.read\(\) lines = data.strip\(\).split\(''\\n''\) for line in lines[-20:]: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) msg = obj.get\(''message'', {}\) role = msg.get\(''role'', ''''\) content = msg.get\(''content'', ''''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': print\(f''[{role}]: {c[""text""][:200]}''\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(f''[{role}]: {content[:200]}''\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = sys.stdin.read\(\) lines = data.strip\(\).split\(''\\n''\) for line in lines[-50:]: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) msg = obj.get\(''message'', {}\) role = msg.get\(''role'', ''''\) content = msg.get\(''content'', ''''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': text = c[''text''].strip\(\) if text: print\(f''[{role}]: {text[:300]}''\) print\(''---''\) elif isinstance\(content, str\) and content.strip\(\): print\(f''[{role}]: {content[:300]}''\) print\(''---''\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = sys.stdin.read\(\) lines = data.strip\(\).split\(''\\n''\) # Get last 100 lines for line in lines[-100:]: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) msg = obj.get\(''message'', {}\) role = msg.get\(''role'', ''''\) content = msg.get\(''content'', ''''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': text = c[''text''].strip\(\) if text and len\(text\) > 20: print\(f''[{role}]: {text[:400]}''\) print\(''---''\) elif isinstance\(content, str\) and len\(content.strip\(\)\) > 20: print\(f''[{role}]: {content[:400]}''\) print\(''---''\) except: pass ")
